chunks.text: Jennifer Listgarten is a Professor in EECS at UC Berkeley. Her contact information includes office location at 8022 Berkeley Way West. She has a personal homepage, dissertations, and research support information available. Natalie Chen can be contacted at nchen86@berkeley.edu.
chunks.question: What is Jennifer Listgarten's position and where is her office?

chunks.text: Jennifer Listgarten earned her Ph.D. in Computer Science from University of Toronto in 2007. Her research areas include Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO) and Artificial Intelligence (AI). She is affiliated with research centers: Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research Lab (BAIR), Center for Computational Biology (CCB), and Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB).
chunks.question: When and where did Jennifer Listgarten earn her Ph.D.?

chunks.text: Jennifer Listgarten teaches CS 189: Introduction to Machine Learning and CS 289A: Introduction to Machine Learning. Both courses are scheduled on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 14:00-15:29 in Wheeler 150. She received the Bakar Fellows Spark Award in 2024.
chunks.question: What courses does Jennifer Listgarten teach and when?
